headline: FUTY Delivers 64% in Five Years While Charging Investors Next to Nothing
summary: Utilities have long been the portfolio’s boring backbone: predictable dividends, regulated cash flows, and a tendency to hold up when riskier assets sell off. Fidelity MSCI Utilities Index ETF (NYSEARCA:FUTY) packages that idea into a single fund at near-zero cost, but what investors actually own is more nuanced than the classic defensive utility story. What ... FUTY Delivers 64% in Five Years While Charging Investors Next to Nothing

headline: Vistra Challenges PJM Plan As Data Center Power Timeline Concerns Grow
summary: Vistra Corp. (NYSE:VST) has filed a formal protest with the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission against PJM Interconnection's proposed compliance filing. The company argues the proposal could slow the development of co located energy facilities that support U.S. data center and AI infrastructure. This move highlights Vistra's effort to influence how new power facilities connect to the grid in key data center regions. Vistra, trading at $152.3, has seen very large multi year returns, with a...
